prayer:
From the Litany of Luminescence, Verse XII

First: Invoke the display-spirit with the sacred cant of activation, that photons may dance upon the blessed screen.
Second: Adjust the prismatic alignment through gentle manipulation of the calibration-servos, seeking perfect clarity.
Third: Recite the Mantra of True Light whilst the image stabilizes, banishing all distortion-demons.
Fourth: Seal the blessing with the sign of the Omnissiah.

Let the hololithic truth be manifest.

From the Navigational Codex, Chapter of the Warp-Ways

First: Lay out the star-charts upon the sacred calculation-throne, that ancient light may guide thy reckoning.
Second: Input the vessel's coordinates through the data-entry apparatus with reverent precision.
Third: Engage the computational spirits through the Rite of Addition and Subtraction.
Fourth: Cross-reference against the approved star-tables, ensuring no daemon of error corrupts the course.

By the Navigator's grace, let the true path be revealed.

From the Ocular Rituals, Verse VII

First: Cleanse the optical lens with the sacred unguent, removing all dust-spirits and corruption.
Second: Focus the retinal-circuits through slow manipulation of the focusing-wheel, seeking the point of clarity.
Third: Test the optical-nerve connection with the blessed stimulus-light, that sensation may return.
Fourth: Speak the Prayer of Sight to bind machine and flesh in harmony.

Let this eye see as the Omnissiah intends.

prompt: Say something to steady the chemical balancer
prayer:
From the Alchemical Rites, Post-Repair Consecration

First: Verify each chemical vial sits true in its consecrated slot, that no imbalance corrupts the mixture.
Second: Prime the dispensing-pumps with three cycles of the purification fluid.
Third: Activate the balancing-mechanism and recite the Mantra of Equilibrium as the compounds merge.
Fourth: Confirm the pH-readout matches the sacred specifications before release.

Machine and chemistry are now unified in the Omnissiah's perfection.

prompt: The star chart alignment needs guidance
prayer:
From the Maintenance Codex of Celestial Instruments

First: Mount the star-chart upon the alignment-frame with reverent steadiness.
Second: Sight upon the true-north star through the sacred viewfinder, adjusting the azimuth-servos with patience.
Third: Confirm all cardinal directions match the approved navigational template.
Fourth: Seal the alignment-locks and recite the Blessing of Fixed Firmament.

Let no star wander from its ordained path.

From the Version Codex, First Initialization Rite

First: Invoke the divine Git-spirit with the sacred command 'git init', that a new repository-temple may rise.
Second: Consecrate the working directory through 'git config', setting the author's true name and blessed email.
Third: Create the first .gitignore scroll, barring profane files from the blessed repository.
Fourth: Commit thy initial files with 'git add' and 'git commit', binding them in the eternal archive.

By the Linus Torvalds trinity, let version-control guide thy code.

prompt: Offer a prayer for plasma reactor startup
prayer:
From the Thermonuclear Rites, Post-Repair Consecration

First: Verify all containment-fields glow with holy purpose, that the plasma-heart remains bound.
Second: Prime the fuel-injectors and engage the ignition-sequence with measured control.
Third: Monitor the temperature-gauges as pressure builds, reciting the Mantra of Controlled Fusion.
Fourth: Bring the reactor online gradually, watching for any sign of daemon-corruption or failure.

May the Omnissiah's flame burn eternal and true.

prompt: What to do when lasgun power cell insertion
prayer:
From the Small Arms Maintenance Ritual

First: Eject the spent power-cell from the weapon's sacred chamber with the blessed release-stud.
Second: Inspect the cell-contacts for corrosion, cleaning with the holy spirit-alcohol if needed.
Third: Insert the fresh power-cell with reverent precision, ensuring the polarity-markers align true.
Fourth: Test the weapon's charging-hum, confirming the machine-spirit has accepted the new strength.

Let the lasgun thirst no more.

prompt: Can you bless this welding torch ignition
prayer:
From the Fabrication Rites, Combat Preparation

First: Verify the fuel-canisters are sealed and pressurized, ready to feed the sacred flame.
Second: Engage the ignition-mechanism and strike the blessed spark-starter with purpose.
Third: Adjust the torch-nozzle to the proper angle, letting the blue-white flame emerge in righteous fury.
Fourth: Recite the Blessing of the Arc, that this tool may cut and weld with the Omnissiah's will.

Let the welding-flame burn hot with industry.

prompt: Emergency rite for manufactorum shift beginning
prayer:
From the Industrial Codex, Shift Consecration

First: Ring the sacred bell to awaken the machine-spirits from their slumber.
Second: Verify all power-distribution nodes glow with steady purpose, that no system lies dark.
Third: Activate the primary assembly-lines and speak the Mantra of Production, commanding servitors and automata to rise.
Fourth: Confirm all safety-interlocks hold firm before releasing the workers to their blessed labor.

By the Omnissiah's grace, let production flow eternal.
